name: cordova-plugin-mlkit-barcodescanner
description: Google MLKit Vision Barcode Scanner Plugin
author: Florian Biebel

scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run clean && npm run transpile
scripts.test:android:prepare: cd test/scan-test-app && npx cordova prepare android && npx cordova plugin add ../../ --link --force
scripts.test:android:build: cd test/scan-test-app && npx cordova build android
scripts.test:android:run: cd test/scan-test-app && npx cordova run android
scripts.test:android: npm run test:android:deps && npm run test:android:prepare && npm run test:android:build && npm run test:android:run
